headline: Fiorentina enter race for Christos Mandas; talks ongoing.
body: Fiorentina have begun exploratory talks regarding a potential move for Christos Mandas.
text:
Fiorentina have entered the race for Christos Mandas. Exploratory talks are ongoing.

No breakthrough yet between Lazio and Bournemouth regarding a return following a loan spell on the south coast last season.🧤
draft_caption:
RUMOUR | Fiorentina enter race for Christos Mandas; talks ongoing.
